mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_knowledge_hit_record ( tenant_id, conversation_id, message_id, chunk_id, query_text, relevance_score, rank_position, used_in_prompt, created_at ) VALUES
(#{r.tenantId}, #{r.conversationId}, #{r.messageId}, #{r.chunkId}, #{r.queryText}, #{r.relevanceScore}, #{r.rankPosition}, #{r.usedInPrompt}, #{r.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, conversation_id, message_id, chunk_id, query_text, relevance_score, rank_position, used_in_prompt, human_feedback, feedback_note, created_at FROM t_knowledge_hit_record WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_knowledge_hit_record WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, conversation_id, message_id, chunk_id, query_text, relevance_score, rank_position, used_in_prompt, human_feedback, feedback_note, created_at FROM t_knowledge_hit_record WHERE chunk_id = #{chunkId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, tenant_id, conversation_id, message_id, chunk_id, query_text, relevance_score, rank_position, used_in_prompt, human_feedback, feedback_note, created_at FROM t_knowledge_hit_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND human_feedback = 'EXCELLENT' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
